response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is a senior-level engineer with over a decade of professional work, far exceeding the entry-level requirement; they have minimal Java experience (listed only as a skill with no project context), lack demonstrated agile project experience in Java environments, and have only basic German proficiency — a hard requirement for client-facing roles in Germany's insurance sector.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and technical teaching background
Proven track record in complex system design and DevOps infrastructure
concerns: Seniority level vastly exceeds entry-level role expectations
Java experience is minimal and not applied in professional projects
German language proficiency is only basic, failing a core requirement
